arts.ttl: Manchester City youth product in attack on Jude Bellingham ahead of match
arts.sum: Manchester City youth product Pablo Maffeo, now at Mallorca, may have stoked the fires ahead of their clash with Real Madrid in the Champions League, by hitting out at Jude Bellingham. AS cover comments from the defender today in which he accuses the midfielder of being a fake and admits he prefers Vinicius Junior to The post Manchester City youth product in attack on Jude Bellingham ahead of match appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Claudio Echeverri comments speak volumes as ‘angry’ Man City star vows to ‘take revenge’

arts.ttl: Zubimendi HIJACK? Arsenal update as Real Madrid, Liverpool stance revealed
arts.sum: There is no risk of Liverpool or Real Madrid hijacking Arsenal's deal to sign Martin Zubimendi as things stand, according to a report. Zubimendi has a closer attachment to his team than most modern footballers and he rejected Liverpool last summer despite the fact that even Real Sociedad had seemingly accepted that he would likely leave.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid learn length of Jude Bellingham ban following controversial red card as Los Blancos make appeal decision
arts.sum: Real Madrid midfielder Jude Bellingham receives a two-match ban following his controversial red card against Osasuna as Los Blancos decide whether to appeal the decision.

arts.sum: Barcelona's 17-year-old starlet Lamine Yamal demonstrated the maturity of a much older player when he was asked about La Liga's refereeing controversies.
